+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.3.7 Identify and protect cold water fishery streams/headwater areas using Clean Water Act tools, state, federal, and non-profit land acquisition programs and other strategies                                                                                                                                                                          | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | Habitat-2.1: Habitat Plans                        |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.4.1 Update and implement state plans for preventing, controlling and managing terrestrial and aquatic invasive species including improving early detection and rapid response capabilities and educating key constituencies; coordinate R.I. and Mass. programs                                                                                         | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | Habitat-2.1: Habitat Plans                        |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.5.1 Establish a comprehensive set of NBR status and trends indicators for critical habitats to assess habitat changes (working off biological condition gradient), impacts, and conservation and restoration progress (2014)                                                                                                                            | Completed          | Revised/Updated  | People-2.3: Indicators                            |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.5.2 Restore/re-fund Rhode Island Natural Heritage program through a multi-organization partnership                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | People-3.1: Finance Plan\                         |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                    |                  | Habitat-2.1: Habitat Plans                        |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.5.3 Continue and enhance ecological approaches to fisheries management including monitoring, applied research, technical training                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Ongoing            | Obsolete         | N/A                                               |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.5.4 Improve fish contamination studies and consumption advisories, particularly as pertains to urban and ethnic communities and populations at risk.                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | Public Spaces- 2.1: Environmental Health Alerts   |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.5.5 Examine science and assess need for additional land and water protections, including identifying applied research needs related to habitat and habitat function; provide resources to conduct needed research.                                                                                                                                      | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | People-2.1: Research Plan\                        |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                    |                  | Habitat-2.1: Habitat Plans                        |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.5.6 Identify compatibility issues related to hydroelectric power generation and river ecosystems; incorporate into hydropower development strategies                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Obsolete           | Obsolete         | N/A                                               |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.5.7 Develop tools and information on biodiversity and priority habitats and make them available to the public and local and other officials to help with planning and management                                                                                                                                                                        | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | People-1.1: Engagement Plan                       |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.5.8 Develop incentives for private property owners to participate in habitat restoration projects                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | People-1.1: Engagement Plan                       |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.5.9 Working with commercial fishermen and shellfishermen, NBNERR, universities, angler associations and other community and technical stakeholders, examine potential for additional protected areas in Narragansett Bay and other coastal waters.                                                                                                      | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | People-1.1: Engagement Plan\                      |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                    |                  | Habitat-2.1 Habitat Plans                         |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.5.10 Use hydrographic models of the Bay and other methods to assess the relationship between areas closed to shellfishing due to pollution and shellfish harvest areas in terms of effects on shellfish populations and potential use of sanctuary or refuge areas for shellfish                                                                        | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | People-2.2: Ecosystem Modeling                    |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.5.11 Develop baseline data on condition and extent of riparian buffer areas                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | Obsolete           | Obsolete         | N/A                                               |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.6.1 Create a R.I. Habitat Restoration program, similar to the Mass. Wetlands Restoration Division of Ecological Restoration, with dedicated, full-time staff to support project implementation, work on needed restoration policy, and integrate agency actions                                                                                         | Ongoing            | Ongoing          | People-3.2: Finance Plan                          |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.6.2 Develop state policies, plans and practices to improve integration of water quality improvement, stormwater measures and physical restoration                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | Water-2.1: Stormwater Guidance and Education\     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                    |                  | Habitat-2.1: Habitat Plans\                       |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                    |                  | Habitat-2.2: Habitat Projects                     |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.6.3 Support and expand R.I. Coastal and Estuarine Habitat Restoration Trust Fund funding, the Mass. Division of Ecological Restoration, NGO-based restoration efforts and federally funded restoration programs (NRCS, USFWS, NBEP, etc.) (2015)                                                                                                        | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | People-3.2: Finance Plan                          |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.6.4 Maintain and expand state-wide and regional mapping of critical watershed and coastal habitats including biodiversity hot spots; use data to support restoration, conservation planning, and enhanced enforcement                                                                                                                                   | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | People-2.2: Ecosystem Modeling                    |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.6.5 Support the efforts of the R.I. Habitat Restoration Team to improve and coordinate habitat restoration projects, funding and policy                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | People-3.2: Finance Plan                          |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.6.6 Develop a continuing seagrass mapping program in R.I. and Mass. coastal waters                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | People-1.2: Research plan                         |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 3.6.7 Create R.I. state lake management program, coordinated with Mass. lakes management that includes requirements for lake management plans that address water quality and invasive species.                                                                                                                                                            | Completed          | Obsolete         | Habitat-2.1: Habitat Plans                        |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.1.1 Identify, protect and restore watershed and riverine natural resources, *e.g.*, wetlands and riparian areas to ensure their continuance as cost-effective protection                                                                                                                                                                                | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | Habitat-2.1: Habitat Plans                        |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.1.2 Remove dams where practicable and beneficial to public safety and/or river ecology; where dams must be retained, ensure that high and moderate hazard dams are fully maintained                                                                                                                                                                     | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | Habitat-3.1: Aquatic Connectivity                 |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.1.3 Improve dam condemnation policies to provide more effective mechanisms for dam removal in R.I. and Mass.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | Habitat-3.1: Aquatic Connectivity                 |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.1.4 Use state and local permitting processes and adaptive restoration programs (*e.g.*, living shorelines) to protect natural coastal features like salt marshes and beaches as well as coastal shoreline processes so that they can continue to provide cost-effective coastal protection.                                                             | Ongoing            | Ongoing          | Habitat-3.2: Salt Marsh Restoration               |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.2.1 Develop strategies and incentives to guide development away from high hazard zones and natural areas that provide storm protection and other benefits (2015)                                                                                                                                                                                        | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | Habitat-3.2: Salt Marsh Restoration               |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.2.2 Design stormwater treatment facilities and green stormwater infrastructure to have adequate capacity over the life of the facility for predicted increased, intensified flow resulting from climate change (2017)                                                                                                                                   | Completed          | Revised/Updated  | Water-1.2: Stormwater Retrofits                   |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.2.3 Develop and implement natural hazard mitigation and adaptation plans for publicly-owned wastewater facilities to reduce potential for pollution impacts from climate related events                                                                                                                                                                 | Completed          | Revised/Updated  | Water-2.1: Centralized Wastewater Infrastructure  |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.2.4 Improve dam inspection and maintenance requirements and enforcement                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Ongoing            | Obsolete         | N/A                                               |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.2.5 Mandate a regular review of state and local plans and risk assessments to incorporate advancements in coastal hazards science                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | Habitat-2.1: Habitat Plans                        |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.2.6 Evaluate the projected effects of saltwater intrusion on coastal onsite wastewater treatment systems, drinking water and stormwater infrastructure                                                                                                                                                                                                  | Ongoing            | Obsolete         | N/A                                               |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.3.1 Develop a shoreline change Special Area Management Plan to address coastal erosion and inundation in response to sea level rise and strategies and incentives to guide development away from special flood hazard areas (2015)                                                                                                                      | Completed          | Revised/Updated  | People-3.2: Regional Targets                      |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.3.2 Develop mechanisms to coordinate responses across the range of interests affected by climate change impacts – state and federal agencies, private sector, institutions, and municipalities                                                                                                                                                          | Obsolete           | Obsolete         | N/A                                               |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.3.3 Create coordinated water release and storage strategies to help address problems related to flows (flooding, infrastructure damage, etc.) from intense storm events.                                                                                                                                                                                | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | Water-3.1: Centralized Wastewater Infrastructure  |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.3.4 Assess and identify the most effective adaptation responses; prioritize implementation of these identified activities (2015)                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | Water-2.1: Stormwater Guidance and Education\     |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                    |                  | Water-2.2: Stormwater Retrofits and Maintenance\  |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                    |                  | Water-1.2: Land Use and Watershed Planning        |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.4.1 Develop funding mechanisms for infrastructure retrofits for affected utilities and structures most likely to be affected by a disaster; identify those critical to public health and environmental priorities (2015)                                                                                                                                | Completed          | Revised/Updated  | People-3.1: Finance Plan                          |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.4.2 Develop additional funding for prioritized dam inspection, maintenance and removal; identify potential funding mechanisms to create a dam management fund                                                                                                                                                                                           | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | People-3.1: Finance Plan                          |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.4.3 Develop/leverage funding for acquisition of properties most vulnerable to damage from climate change impacts, targeting those which could provide multiple benefits such as habitat retreat, recharge, open space, recreation, and flood storage                                                                                                    | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | Habitat-2.2: Habitat Plans                        |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.4.4 Modify and enhance state State Revolving Fund programs to encourage communities to address climate change impacts and avoid investment in highly vulnerable areas                                                                                                                                                                                   | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | Water-3.2: Onsite Wastewater Systems              |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.4.5 Increase state resources and secure additional federal resources to meet identified science research needs                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Ongoing            | Ongoing          | People-2.1: Research Plan                         |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.5.1 Continue to improve accuracy of inundation models for coastal and riverine floodplains to support long term planning; apply the results of state pilot projects and NEP Climate Ready Estuaries projects in planning for resilience                                                                                                                 | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | People-2.2: Ecosystem Modeling\                   |
|                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |                    |                  | Habitat-2.1: Habitat Plans                        |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.5.2 Identify applied research needs to better assess impacts of climate change on watershed and bay ecosystems                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | People-1.2: Research Plan                         |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.5.3 Use data generated by regional Light Detection and Ranging (LIDAR) topographic surveys and high-resolution bathymetry databases to support floodplain mapping, sea-level rise and storm surge modeling                                                                                                                                              | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | People-2.2: Ecosystem Modeling                    |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.6.1 Develop land conservation and adaptation plans for wetland migration to include protection of adjacent upland areas (2015)                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Ongoing            | Revised/Updated  | Habitat-3.2: Salt Marsh Restoration               |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.6.2 Assess effectiveness and determine feasibility for use of Living Shorelines programs in the Narragansett Bay Region                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | Obsolete           | Obsolete         | N/A                                               |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
| 4.6.3 Adopt an approach, where possible, that accommodates rather than resists flood waters by restoring floodplain buffers for use as marsh or forest land; Employ resilience design where possible to absorb stormwater in extreme events, particularly in light of projected increased precipitation                                                   | Obsolete           | Obsolete         | N/A                                               |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+--------------------+------------------+---------------------------------------------------+
